mapper.select:
SELECT content FROM (
( SELECT content, 1 - (embedding <-> #{vector}::vector) AS score FROM document LIMIT 3 )
UNION ALL
( SELECT content, ts_rank( to_tsvector('english', content), plainto_tsquery('english', #{question}) ) AS score FROM document WHERE to_tsvector('english', content) @@ plainto_tsquery('english', #{question}) LIMIT 3 )
) t
ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 3
